Title: Test User Creation
Test Data:
- nome: John
  - cognome: Doe
  - email: johndoe@example.com
  - password: password123
  - isVenditore: false

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user registration page.

Expected Result:
- The user is successfully created with the provided data.
